creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
Created attachment 153827
patch to the port tree with all 7 ports

Add some p5 ports needed by net-mgmt/netdisco v2 (coming)

These ports are build with poudriere for some months, on 8.x/i386, 9.x/i386, 9.x/amd64 and 10.x/amd64

Last build logs available here:
http://ftp.ec-m.fr/pkg/data/latest-per-pkg/p5-Algorithm-Cron/0.09/
http://ftp.ec-m.fr/pkg/data/latest-per-pkg/p5-App-local-lib-helper/0.07/
http://ftp.ec-m.fr/pkg/data/latest-per-pkg/p5-Time-timegm/0.01/
http://ftp.ec-m.fr/pkg/data/latest-per-pkg/p5-AnyEvent-DNS-EtcHosts/0.0103/
http://ftp.ec-m.fr/pkg/data/latest-per-pkg/p5-NetAddr-MAC/0.93/
http://ftp.ec-m.fr/pkg/data/latest-per-pkg/p5-Template-Plugin-CSV/0.04/
http://ftp.ec-m.fr/pkg/data/latest-per-pkg/p5-URL-Encode/0.03/
(not attaching them all here, should I ?)

Should the maintainer be perl@ ?
